item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-06-25 - Today's Summary
[sustained_hot] calesthio/OpenMontage (+3708 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +3708，总 stars 20,039，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+1265 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1265，总 stars 40,043，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] topoteretes/cognee (+1314 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Cognee is the open-source AI memory platform for agents. Give your AI agents persistent long-term memory across sessions with a self-hosted knowledge graph engine. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1314，总 stars 21,727，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis (+1424 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。 LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1424，总 stars 48,812，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] nexu-io/open-design (+586 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: 🎨 Local-first, open-source Claude Design alternative. 🖥️ Native desktop app. ⚡ 259+ Skills · ✨ 142+ Design Systems 🖼️ Web · desktop · mobile prototypes · slides · images · videos · HyperFrames 📦 Sandboxed preview · HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export 🤖 Claude Code / OpenClaw / Codex / Cursor / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi & 17+ CLIs. item.title: [sudden_breakout] vllm-project/vllm (+452 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Local LLM / Inference Description: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs Why it matters: Local LLM / Inference 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +452，前 3 日均值 130.7，加速度 3.5x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看部署复杂度、性能边界和模型兼容性，判断是否能进入本地 AI 应用栈。 Risk: Low
